name: NetworkSessions
summary: The NetworkSessions collector gets information of currently open network sessions (connections made from a remote computer to a shared resource) on the device.

fields.name: computer
fields.description: IP or host name of remote device.

fields.name: user
fields.description: User logged on to host through the network session.

fields.name: file
fields.description: Path of local resource being accessed by client (Windows only).

fields.name: idletime
fields.description: Time since last session activity (Windows only).

examples.title: Example: Show which shared resources are being accessed by user name "owilde"
Network sessions by non-system drives or IPC$ shares
examples.v2_query:
NetworkSessions computer, user, client, file
    WHERE NetworkSessions file not ends with "$"

examples.title: Network sessions by CIFS share type
examples.v2_query:
NetworkSessions computer, user, client, file
    WHERE NetworkSessions file equals "cifsshare"

examples.title: Network sessions by specific user - single
examples.v2_query:
NetworkSessions computer, user, client, file
    WHERE NetworkSessions user equals "alice"

examples.title: Network sessions by specific user - many
examples.v2_query:
NetworkSessions computer, user, client, file
    WHERE NetworkSessions user equals "alice"
        OR NetworkSessions user equals "bob"
        OR NetworkSessions user equals "frank"

examples.title: Network sessions by source system - single
examples.v2_query:
NetworkSessions computer, user, client, file
    WHERE NetworkSessions computer equals "PC1"
